items.title: Arrays & Lists
items.description: Strings behave like immutable lists of characters — slicing copies, joining is O(n), repeated `+=` is O(n²).

items.title: Tuples
items.description: Both are immutable sequences; strings hold Unicode characters, tuples hold arbitrary objects in fixed positions.

items.title: Hash Tables
items.description: Strings are hashable and are the most common dict keys; CPython caches their hash.
